## CryptoUtils.EncryptionHelper.generateKey() method

Generates a new encryption key.

**Signature:**

```typescript
generateKey(): Promise<Result<Uint8Array>>;
```
**Returns:**

Promise&lt;Result&lt;Uint8Array&gt;&gt;
